name: Hollyland VenusLiv V2 All-in-One Live Streaming Camera
description: Livestream up to 4K30 footage with ease using the VenusLiv V2 All-in-One Live Streaming Camera from Hollyland. This second version features the same one-touch livestream capabilities with upgraded resolution and pre-installed apps for integration with social media.

features.Key Features:: 24/7 Live Streaming 4K Camera | Horizontal & Vertical Output | 5" Touchscreen, HollyOS 2.0 | RTMP, UVC, LAN, Bluetooth & Wi-Fi | 6x Zoom Lens with 80° Angle of View
features.What's in the box?: Hollyland VenusLiv V2 All-in-One Live Streaming Camera | Power Adapter (12V, 2A) | Lens Cap | USB-C to USB-A Cable (10') | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
